title: 誇りをまとうに相応しく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has asked me for special training,
which I'm more than happy to prepare for her, but
when I arrive at the grounds...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You're finally here. I've prepared myself both
mentally and physically for your arrival.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us advance along the route to perfect
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash greets me like a knight ready for
battle. She's even wearing her signature
racewear... but why?
choice_data_list: Wha... Why are you dressed like that?
Wha... Why are you dressed like that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Do I look... strange?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I knew it! I shouldn't have done this! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Apologies for running off so abruptly...
choice_data_list: What happened? That wasn't like you.
What happened? That wasn't like you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well... The embarrassment became too much for
me to bear when I thought about how
incompetent I must still seem in your eyes, so...
choice_data_list: Wait, what made you think that?
Wait, what made you think that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To be truthful, I have been concerned about my
signature racewear...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
During its creation phase, I asked for it to be
designed to reflect my home country.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And when it was completed, it was evident that
the meister's spirit resided within every stitch. The
craftsmanship left me in awe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The outfit is magnificent, but it feels so heavy...
Like I might get crushed beneath it...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
When I don this outfit, it is not only fabric that
rests upon my shoulders, but the weight of my
homeland's pride and traditions too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother must have felt this very same weight
and pressure when she raced in Germany.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know if I'm truly worthy of wearing
these clothes and representing all they signify.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I wanted you to help me determine that today.
choice_data_list:
So that's why you're in your signature
racewear...

So that's why you're in your signature
racewear...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It is also why I greeted you like that earlier.
Unfortunately, I seem to have acted carelessly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I finally have a handle on the situation, I
think I know what she needs right now.
choice_data_list:
Let's have you run in it so you can get used to
it.
I think you're due a baking session!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's a good idea. I too believe that would
be the best remedy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Eishin Flash participates in her next
scrimmage in her signature racewear. As for how
she does...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite seeming a little ill at ease, she manages
to place first in the end!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I have returned.
choice_data_list: You look kind of troubled. What's wrong?
You look kind of troubled. What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I stopped thinking about whether I'm worthy of
carrying my country's pride on my back and
representing my people halfway through the
race...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I became so absorbed in running as fast as I could
that I forgot all about it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I won't simply be unworthy of my
outfit—I'll be doing a disservice to my fellow
competitors.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The least I can do right now is to thank them for
today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks
for today's race. Furthermore, I must apologize
for how I—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hi, Flash! That was a great race! I'm glad we
got to run together!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? B-but—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it stinks that I lost, but whenever I'm up
against you, it makes me wanna try even harder.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Same here! Running with you really is fun. I always
know you're giving it your all and offering us an
honest race.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you always thank us after each race too.
You're so thoughtful and polite, it makes me want
to polish up my manners!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, sorry for droning on and on! Anyway,
I'm going to work on getting faster, so let's race
again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It'd be my pleasure! I will face you with every fiber
of my being next time too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...
choice_data_list: Seems you are worthy of that racewear!
Seems you are worthy of that racewear!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Do you truly think so? Do you truly believe I
conduct myself in a manner worthy of it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you. I feel as though a weight has
been lifted from me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was nothing to it at all. Eishin Flash has
been worthy of carrying her country's pride all
along.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh... Why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pastry-making runs in her blood, and I'm sure
she'll feel more confident once she realizes how
deeply connected she already is to her home
country.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I suppose baking is a kind of traditional art that
has been refined through generations of meisters.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I shall attempt to bake something my
parents taught me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, a German cake called Frankfurter
Kranz.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reserving the dorm kitchen for her, I decide
to wait in my office until she's done baking.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Next, the sugar. And then I have to mix in the
butter...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There, the batter is now complete. All that
remains is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Strange. My body is carrying out all the proper
steps without any conscious thought...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Everything I measure is correct down to the gram
too... It's as though the process has been instilled
within me.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (Oh... I see now. This must mean I'm already...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I apologize for the wait.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Here you go. Guten Appetit.
choice_data_list: Thanks! I can't wait to taste it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...How is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm so very happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I actually tried some of it before coming here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The taste reminded me of my homeland... It tastes
just like the cakes I grew up eating. It's a recipe
I've known for so long...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I realized there was never a need for me to try to
embody my country's values. My homeland's
traditions are already part of my very core.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for helping me realize this. My heart
and mind feel much clearer now.
